name: Tambora Flash

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: D9BB90DE-8A21-4B97-9345-B5D0982AF7C5

comment:
It is the only hybrid fixture on the market that can act simultaneously as a strobe, wash, and blinder, specifically designed with a modular approach for use in a linear array, to offer new creative opportunities to lighting designers.

The strobe section is based on two strips of very powerful white LEDs and a large beam angle aperture, capable of bringing a real impact of light into the show.
